scripts.dev: node scripts/dev/dev-stack.mjs up && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web
scripts.test:full: node scripts/dev/test-full-preflight.mjs && pnpm check && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @compass/db-tools run migrate:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:unit && pnpm --filter @compass/contracts run generate && pnpm --filter @compass/sdk run generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/contracts/openapi/openapi.json packages/sdk/src/generated/schema.ts
scripts.check:ci: pnpm --filter @compass/db-tools run migrate:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm turbo run lint --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/worker --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk -- --max-warnings=0 && tsc -b --pretty false && pnpm turbo run typecheck --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/worker --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk && pnpm turbo run test --filter=@compass/api --filter=@compass/web --filter=@compass/worker --filter=@compass/contracts --filter=@compass/sdk --ui=stream --log-order=grouped -- --silent=passed-only --reporter=dot && pnpm --filter @compass/contracts run generate && pnpm --filter @compass/sdk run generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/contracts/openapi/openapi.json packages/sdk/src/generated/schema.ts
